title: Greek Oat Casserole with Indulgent Topping
description: A twist on the classic casserole, combining Greek flavors with a crunchy indulgent topping. Perfect as a comforting dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together oats, Greek yogurt, feta cheese, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix together egg, butter, onion, and spinach.
Combine the egg mixture with the oat mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together pecans, honey, and brown sugar.
Sprinkle the topping mixture evenly over the casserole.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the casserole is golden brown and the topping is crispy.
